title: Best House | Food Storage Box Container with Lids | Round | Set Of 3 Pcs | 750 ml + 1000 ml + 1500 ml | Transparent | BPA Free | Multi Storage Containers Microwave, Freezer & Dishwasher Safe
features: LONG LASTING - Built to last, these strong plastic storage boxes with lids are made from impact resistant polypropylene that is fully recyclable.

DURABE AND SECURE STORAGE - These heavy-duty storage boxes are made with high quality plastic. These Storage Boxes with Clips and Lids provide solution for organizing home, office, garage. The secure clips and tight-fitting lids keep contents safe from dust, dirt, and moisture.

CLEAR ORGANIZATION - Our plastic organizing crates are more transparent than most containers on the market. That's awesome because it lets you easily stay organized without having to open your boxes or move them to check what's inside. This is especially helpful for toys, tools, food and clothing.

HEAVY DUTY PROTECTION - Avoid the cracking, splitting and dents that plague most plastic bins and boxes. Our stackable designs distribute weight properly to avoid breaking and our plastic polymer is sturdier than most plastics without adding extra weight or bulky reinforcement points.
PRODUCT SIZE: - 750 ml (D 15.5cm x H 5cm), 1000 ml (D 16.8cm x H 6cm), 1500 ml (D 18.8cm x H 7.3cm)
PRODUCT AND DIMENSION - Set Of 3 Pcs (750 ml + 1000 ml + 1500 ml) Round Transparent Multi Storage Box
